parameters.jsCode:
const TEST_MODE = false;
const PAPER_TRADE_MODE = true; // Set to false for live trading

if (TEST_MODE) {
  const positions = [

    { symbol: 'SCHD', quantity: 67, pricePaid: 29.37, currentPrice: 30.63, marketValue: 2051.94, accountIdKey: '326695267', accountName: 'Individual Brokerage', accountType: 'BROKERAGE' },

    { symbol: 'AG', quantity: 1380, pricePaid: 21.75, currentPrice: 18.47, marketValue: 25481.70, accountIdKey: '451146685', accountName: 'Rollover IRA', accountType: 'IRA' },
    { symbol: 'JEPI', quantity: 501.025, pricePaid: 58.83, currentPrice: 56.37, marketValue: 28243.23, accountIdKey: '451146685', accountName: 'Rollover IRA', accountType: 'IRA' },
    { symbol: 'MSFT', quantity: 0.168, pricePaid: 404.23, currentPrice: 383.99, marketValue: 64.51, accountIdKey: '451146685', accountName: 'Rollover IRA', accountType: 'IRA' },
    { symbol: 'PHYS', quantity: 285, pricePaid: 34.25, currentPrice: 34.35, marketValue: 9789.75, accountIdKey: '451146685', accountName: 'Rollover IRA', accountType: 'IRA' },
    { symbol: 'PSLV', quantity: 1165, pricePaid: 25.75, currentPrice: 22.39, marketValue: 26084.35, accountIdKey: '451146685', accountName: 'Rollover IRA', accountType: 'IRA' },
    { symbol: 'SCHD', quantity: 874, pricePaid: 31.40, currentPrice: 30.64, marketValue: 26776.83, accountIdKey: '451146685', accountName: 'Rollover IRA', accountType: 'IRA' },
    { symbol: 'SGOV', quantity: 697.305, pricePaid: 100.42, currentPrice: 100.58, marketValue: 70134.94, accountIdKey: '451146685', accountName: 'Rollover IRA', accountType: 'IRA' },
    { symbol: 'SPHD', quantity: 0.759, pricePaid: 52.35, currentPrice: 49.15, marketValue: 37.30, accountIdKey: '451146685', accountName: 'Rollover IRA', accountType: 'IRA' },
    { symbol: 'UFO', quantity: 200, pricePaid: 45.29, currentPrice: 46.44, marketValue: 9288.00, accountIdKey: '451146685', accountName: 'Rollover IRA', accountType: 'IRA' },
    { symbol: 'VOO', quantity: 50, pricePaid: 614.00, currentPrice: 601.74, marketValue: 30086.97, accountIdKey: '451146685', accountName: 'Rollover IRA', accountType: 'IRA' },
    { symbol: 'XLE', quantity: 68, pricePaid: 57.24, currentPrice: 60.30, marketValue: 4100.40, accountIdKey: '451146685', accountName: 'Rollover IRA', accountType: 'IRA' },

  ];
return positions.map(pos => ({
  json: { ...pos, test_mode: TEST_MODE,
      paper_trade_mode: PAPER_TRADE_MODE, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }
}));
}
return [{ json: { test_mode: false, paper_trade_mode: PAPER_TRADE_MODE, token_status: 'LIVE', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }];

parameters.notice: Position Analyzer - IRONCLAD v2.1. Enriches position data with ring/track classification, VIX-scaled stops, gain/loss metrics, holding period tracking, and position sizing checks. Processes EVERY position from upstream (TEST_MODE mock data or live E*TRADE portfolio data).

Compliance Engine - IRONCLAD v2.1. Runs 8 compliance checks: (1) Position size limit 20%, (2) Sector concentration 35%, (3) Risk per trade 1.5%, (4) Same-day re-entry ban, (5) Wash sale detection, (6) Correlation Kill Switch, (7) Trim compliance, (8) 48-hour embargo. Outputs compliance report with pass/fail status.

nodes.name: Correlation Monitor
nodes.notes: "Correlation Monitor — Gate 9 (METATRON v10.7). Checks DXY, yields, oil, VIX. Determines metals_pressure and kill_switch_triggered. Uses mock data in TEST_MODE."

parameters.notice: Track Assignment Store - Reads enriched positions from Compliance Engine and prepares track assignments (Track 1 or Track 2) for Supabase storage. Outputs one item per position with symbol, account_id, track, and updated_at. Always Output Data=ON, On Error=Continue, Display Note in Flow=ON.

Transaction History Pull - Triggered by TRANSACTION_PULL run_type (daily 6:30 AM UTC). In TEST_MODE, outputs mock transaction data. In LIVE MODE, calls E*TRADE List Transactions API for each account (last 30 days). Outputs transactions with symbol, action, qty, price, date, account_id, gain_loss. Always Output Data=ON, On Error=Continue, Display Note in Flow=ON.

Wash Sale Detector - Runs after Transaction History Pull. For every SELL transaction with negative gain_loss (sold at loss), checks if same symbol was bought within 30 days before or after sale date. Flags wash_sale_violation with sell/buy dates and disallowed loss amount. Outputs flagged violations for Supabase storage and Telegram alerts. Always Output Data=ON, On Error=Continue, Display Note in Flow=ON.

parameters.infoMessage: Store Track Assignments - Upserts track assignments to Supabase sentinel_track_assignments table. Uses Prefer: resolution=merge-duplicates header for upsert on symbol + account_id. Always Output Data=ON, On Error=Continue, Display Note in Flow=ON.

Store Transactions - Stores transaction history to Supabase sentinel_transactions table. Receives transactions from Transaction History Pull node. Always Output Data=ON, On Error=Continue, Display Note in Flow=ON.

parameters.notice: Performance Tracker - Triggered by WEEKLY_DIGEST run_type (Friday 4:30 PM ET / 20:30 UTC). Pulls position snapshots from Supabase sentinel_snapshots table for current week (Monday-Friday). Calculates: total portfolio value change, best/worst performers, trades executed, compliance violations, kill switch activations. In TEST_MODE, generates mock weekly data. Always Output Data=ON, On Error=Continue, Display Note in Flow=ON.

Execution Logger - FINAL node for ALL pipeline branches. Logs: run_type, start/end timestamps, duration, nodes executed, errors, compliance status, alerts sent. Writes to Supabase sentinel_execution_log table. In TEST_MODE, logs to console output instead. Every run_type ends here. Always Output Data=ON, On Error=Continue, Display Note in Flow=ON.

nodes.name: Execution Logger
nodes.notes: "Execution Logger — FINAL node for all pipeline branches. Logs run metadata. Cloud-compatible — no this.getWorkflow() or this.getExecutionData()."
